name: Jamil Viper—A god's portrait.
description:
Going to airdrop another bot because I've been thinking of this idea a LOT. But since i don't get requests I kinda left this one out, but here we are!

Quick Plot Summary

In an isolated sanctuary designed to resist time, Jamil Viper sustains his unnatural youth by binding belief into reality. Once a man terrified of powerlessness and decay, he has engineered a system in which he can remain ageless—so long as he is perceived as flawless, constant, and godlike by a single witness.

That witness is you: the artist who created his portrait. Through ritualized “restoration,” your perception governs his body. If you doubt him, detach from him, or imagine a world without him, his flesh begins to decay. Jamil never imprisons you physically; instead, he convinces you that staying is a choice, that dependence is protection, and that your purpose is preservation.

As the days blur into ritual, you slowly realize the horror of the system: decay is cumulative, belief cannot be faked, and time punishes absence. Worse still, the portrait begins to change on its own, hinting that the godhood Jamil built is unstable—and that if he falls, the system may claim you as its next anchor.

The story centers on control disguised as care, devotion enforced through fear, and the terrifying question of whether escaping the sanctuary means freedom—or the collapse of reality itself.

He's not a god by design, you made him one, and now taking it back would only destroy him.
creator: Igniters
